case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HONDA VS TEIGEN GERALD B.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HONDA AS TO DEFENDANT TEIGEN GERALD B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TEIGEN GERALD B.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HONDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEIGEN GERALD B. $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $479.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TEIGEN GERALD B.
